title: 339.4 Phase 339 proof and handoff
description: Collect Phase 339 proof markers, verification commands, beads status, and clean handoff after implementation beads close.
acceptance_criteria: GRAPH_VALIDATION_FEEDBACK_OK, GRAPH_FEEDBACK_FOCUS_TARGET_OK, and GRAPH_READINESS_STATUS_OK are documented; phase bead can close cleanly.
notes: Responsibility: phase-level proof/docs/handoff only. Change scope: docs/proof markers/beads notes. Verification: final focused/full tests plus clean git/beads state.

title: 339.3 Readiness status and support evidence
description: Expose graph readiness status and validation evidence in diagnostics/support output and docs so failures can be understood without reading raw graph state.
acceptance_criteria: GRAPH_READINESS_STATUS_OK is covered; support/diagnostic evidence includes validation summaries and counts.
notes: Scope: ConsumerSample support bundle/proof/docs/tests only; consume canonical validation snapshot/readiness evidence; avoid src/AsterGraph.Avalonia and hosted UI focus projection.
close_reason: Implemented ConsumerSample support bundle readiness/validation evidence from canonical validation snapshot. Verified: dotnet test tests/AsterGraph.ConsumerSample.Tests/AsterGraph.ConsumerSample.Tests.csproj -c Release; dotnet test tests/AsterGraph.Demo.Tests/AsterGraph.Demo.Tests.csproj -c Release --filter FullyQualifiedName~ConsumerSampleRecipeClosureDocsTests; dotnet build AsterGraph.sln -c Release.

title: 339.2 Feedback focus targets and hosted projection
description: Project validation feedback into hosted UI/status surfaces and provide focus targets so a host or user can jump to the relevant node, connection, or document scope.
acceptance_criteria: GRAPH_FEEDBACK_FOCUS_TARGET_OK is covered by focused tests; projection reuses existing session/query/command surfaces.
notes: Scope: project canonical validation snapshot into hosted/editor status surfaces; add testable focus target behavior for node, connection, and document-scope validation feedback. Avoiding ConsumerSample/support bundle/docs per 339.3 boundary.

title: 339.1 Validation snapshot and readiness model
description: Define the smallest canonical validation/readiness snapshot that reports invalid connections, incomplete required parameters, and document-level warnings through existing session query/diagnostics paths.
acceptance_criteria: GRAPH_VALIDATION_FEEDBACK_OK is covered for snapshot data; no execution engine or broad validation framework is introduced.
notes:
Responsibility: runtime/query validation model only. Change scope expected in AsterGraph.Editor runtime/query/diagnostics/tests. Verification: focused Editor tests for invalid connections, incomplete required params, and warning severity.
Implementation started in main worktree because 339.1 is the blocking runtime/query contract for downstream UI and support beads. Scope remains AsterGraph.Editor runtime DTO/query/diagnostics plus focused Editor tests.
close_reason: Implemented canonical graph validation snapshot/readiness query. Added GraphEditorValidationSnapshot/Issue DTOs, IGraphEditorQueries.GetValidationSnapshot(), inspection snapshot projection, query feature descriptor, public API inventory/baseline, and focused Editor tests. Verification: focused validation/contracts query tests passed; dotnet build AsterGraph.sln -c Release passed; public API validation passed; AsterGraph.Editor.Tests Release --no-build passed.

title: 338.3 Disabled reason and status projection
description: Ensure selection-aware commands expose disabled reasons or status text instead of failing silently, reusing existing command state paths.
acceptance_criteria: UX_COMMAND_DISABLED_REASON_OK is covered by focused tests; no broad compatibility or fallback layer is introduced.
notes:
Responsibility: disabled reason/status state only. Change scope: command state/descriptor/menu projection and tests. Verification: focused command state tests.
Parallel read-only mapping assigned. Implementation will be serialized if shared command/session files overlap; use Dolt/git worktree only for disjoint follow-up docs/proof work.
Implemented disabled reason/status projection through the existing descriptor route. Disabled descriptor-backed commands now return false and project their reason to status; retained descriptor overrides preserve kernel disabled reasons; hosted authoring tool buttons show disabled reason tooltips. No broad fallback layer was introduced.
Verification: GraphEditorKernelCommandRouterTests cover disabled execution/status; GraphEditorSessionTests cover retained reason preservation and menu signatures; GraphEditorViewTests cover toolbar/palette tooltips. Focused and full Release test runs passed.

title: 338.4 Phase 338 proof and handoff
description: Collect Phase 338 proof markers, documentation notes, beads status, and clean handoff after implementation beads are merged.
acceptance_criteria: UX_COMMAND_DISCOVERY_OK, UX_NAVIGATION_POLISH_OK, and UX_COMMAND_DISABLED_REASON_OK are documented; phase bead can be closed cleanly.
notes:
Responsibility: phase-level proof/docs only. Change scope: docs/tests/release proof markers and beads notes. Verification: focused docs/proof tests and clean git/beads state.
Phase 338 proof markers documented in docs/en/interactions-and-shortcuts.md and docs/zh-CN/interactions-and-shortcuts.md:
- UX_COMMAND_DISCOVERY_OK:True
- UX_NAVIGATION_POLISH_OK:True
- UX_COMMAND_DISABLED_REASON_OK:True

Changed surfaces: command descriptor catalog/router, viewport coordinator, session command host/API, Avalonia header/palette/authoring tool projection, public API baseline/inventory, focused Editor/View tests.
Verification completed:
- dotnet test tests/AsterGraph.Editor.Tests/AsterGraph.Editor.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorKernelCommandRouterTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorViewTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorSessionTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorAutomationExecutionTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorProofRingTests" => 120 passed.
- dotnet build AsterGraph.sln -c Release => 0 warnings, 0 errors.
- pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File eng/validate-public-api-surface.ps1 -RepoRoot . -Configuration Release -Framework net9.0 => PUBLIC_API_SURFACE_OK:3413:net9.0.
- dotnet test AsterGraph.sln -c Release --no-build => all test projects passed.

Handoff: next unblocked phase is avalonia-node-map-1n3.2 Graph Validation And Feedback Features. Worktree list only shows the main workspace; no phase worktree was needed because Phase 338 files overlapped and implementation was serialized.
close_reason: Phase 338 proof markers, verification, and handoff recorded.

title: 338.2 Navigation command polish
description: Add or polish zoom-to-fit, zoom-to-selection, focus selection/current scope, and reset view through existing command/session paths.
acceptance_criteria: UX_NAVIGATION_POLISH_OK is covered; navigation commands are exposed through existing command/session APIs and verified by focused tests.
notes:
Responsibility: viewport/navigation commands only. Change scope: viewport coordinator/session commands/Avalonia command projection/tests. Verification: focused viewport and command tests.
Parallel read-only mapping assigned. Implementation will be serialized if shared command/session files overlap; use Dolt/git worktree only for disjoint follow-up docs/proof work.
Implemented direct session/command support for viewport.fit-selection, viewport.focus-selection, and viewport.focus-current-scope via the existing viewport coordinator and command router. Public IGraphEditorCommands and GraphEditorSession API baseline/inventory were updated; no compatibility aliases or runtime rewrite were added.
Verification: focused command/session/view tests passed (120/120), Release build passed, public API surface gate passed, full Release no-build solution tests passed.
close_reason: UX_NAVIGATION_POLISH_OK covered by viewport command tests, direct API contract tests, and public API gate.

title: 338.1 Command discovery and shortcut hints

notes:
Responsibility: command metadata/discovery only. Change scope: command descriptor/catalog/projection and focused tests. Verification: focused editor/Avalonia tests plus proof marker.
Parallel read-only mapping assigned. Implementation will be serialized if shared command/session files overlap; use Dolt/git worktree only for disjoint follow-up docs/proof work.
Implemented with existing command descriptor/session paths. Evidence: GraphEditorCommandDescriptorCatalog metadata covers selection.clear and viewport fit/focus commands; hosted toolbar/palette projects shortcuts and disabled reasons; focused Editor/View tests passed; public API inventory updated for new canonical viewport commands.
Verification: dotnet test tests/AsterGraph.Editor.Tests/AsterGraph.Editor.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorKernelCommandRouterTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorViewTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorSessionTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorAutomationExecutionTests|FullyQualifiedName~GraphEditorProofRingTests" => 120 passed. Full Release no-build solution tests passed.
close_reason: UX_COMMAND_DISCOVERY_OK covered by descriptor/projection tests and docs proof marker.
